name: praxiskit
description: Turn product intent into governed agent execution and final acceptance review through composable skills.

interface.longDescription: PraxisKit turns ideas into PRDs, Kanban plans, coordinated agent execution, and final result reviews for user acceptance.
defaultPrompt: Use PraxisKit to turn this rough idea into a PRD and implementation plan.
Use kanban-to-agents to advance work/kanban.md with coordinated agents.
Use build-to-review to present the final implemented result for acceptance.
